# GroupWork

> GroupWork is an academic group project management platform built for university students collaborating on assignments.

## What it does
GroupWork helps student teams organise tasks, communicate in real time, schedule meetings, share resources, and track each member's contributions across a project's lifecycle.

## Core features
- Kanban task boards with priorities, due dates, subtasks, and status tracking
- Group chat with @mentions, pinned messages, and threaded replies
- Shared calendar with meetings, deadlines, and custom events
- Resource library for Google Docs, PDFs, and links
- Workload view showing per-member task distribution
- Contribution log tracking activity across the group
- Progress metrics tied to rubric weightings

## Who it is for
University and college students working on group projects and assignments.

## Technology
Next.js, Supabase (auth + realtime + database), Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, deployed on Vercel.

## Contact
Source: https://github.com/hat1m11/GroupWork
